headline: NetApp (NASDAQ:NTAP) Screens Well as a Sustainable Dividend Stock
summary: NetApp (NTAP) offers a sustainable 1.16% dividend with strong profitability (9/10 rating) and solid financial health. A balanced pick for income-focused investors seeking reliable payouts over high yield.
